texto: The 2016 cyberattack was not just another case of simple Kompromat - meddling in the political affairs of a satellite nation or an individual dissenter. It was a direct attempt to hijack and derail the traditional processes and norms that held the United States together for more than 240 years. The attempt was even more brazen due to the apparent belief that Putin assumed that he and his oligarchy could charm, groom and select a candidate, then with the right amount of cybercrime and enough organized propaganda they could actually choose a president of the United States to do their bidding.
explicacao: Citação de Malcolm Nance sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The 2016 cyberattack was not just another case of simple Kompromat - meddling in the political af…” articula reflexao, 2016-presidential-race, cyber-warfare em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como cyber-warfare e donald-trump.
